name: Xalka Ringer's Lactated (LR)
description: Dheecaan isotonic crystalloid oo dheellitiran. Laga door biday cusbada caadiga ah ee dib u soo noolaynta dhaawacyada mug weyn -- jidh ahaan dheeli tiran, khatarta yar ee hyperchloremic acidosis. Waxa ku jira sodium, potassium, calcium, lactate.
indications: Soo kicinta dhaawaca (loo door biday crystalloid ee shoogga dhiigbaxa)
Guba dib u soo kicinta dareeraha ( formula Parkland)
dose: Hemorrhagic shock: Ku xaddid 1L max ka hor inta aan loo gudbin wax soo saarka dhiigga. Bartilmaameedka SBP 80-90 mmHg gasha dhaawacyada, 90 mmHg TBI. Burns (Parkland): 4 mL x kg x %TBSA ayaa gubtay in ka badan 24 saac (kala badh 8dii saac ee hore).
contraindications: Beerka oo aad u xumaaday ( dheef-shiid kiimikaad lactate oo daciifa - qaraabo)
warnings: Wali crystalloid -- ma qaadi karo ogsijiin. Badeecooyinka dhiigu waxay aad uga sarreeyaan shoogga dhiigbaxa. LR waa buundo kaliya.
Ha ku darin wax soo saarka dhiigga isla xariiqii (kalsiyumku wuxuu keenaa xinjirowga).
Ha ku degdegin dib-u-soo-nooleynta gudaha dhaawaca ka hor inta aan la xakameynin dhiigbaxa.

pediatric.dose: 20 ml/kg bolus, dib u qiimee. Loo door biday NS ee dhaawacyada carruurta.

obstetric.note: Dareeraha faleebbaha ee la door bidayo ee foosha iyo dhalmada. Ku haboon dib u soo kicinta dhiigbaxa umusha.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS / ABA Burn Guidelines
